notes: This manifest is a human+machine-readable snapshot of current side-effect capabilities.
merge/deploy are reserved names and are currently blocked by request-envelope schema (fail-closed).
gating_rules: dry_run=true => no writes, no PRs (plans only)
side_effect_policy=pr (dry_run=false) requires APPROVAL to pass or a resume approve step before MOD_B runs
github_pr_create requires ORCH_INTEGRATION_MODE=1 + policy_security.network_access=true + api.github.com allowlist + policy_secrets allows GITHUB_TOKEN + secret present
